### Added
- Make sidebar logo image height configurable via `app.branding.logo.height`.
### Fixed
- Avoid flashing the default logo while the branding manifest is loading.
See [./docs/releases/v0.124.4-changelog.md](https://github.com/giantswarm/backstage/blob/main/docs/releases/v0.124.4-changelog.md) for more information.
